Business Influence Challenge Webinar with Dr. Cialdini
Get Cialdini’s Expert Take on Your Business Influence Challenges
To celebrate the 40th anniversary of the book 'Influence,' Cialdini offers his advice to those who send in their Business Influence
Challenge. This is a thank you to everyone who has shown interest in ethical influence and persuasion, from top brands like Apple,
Google, and Allianz to the millions of individual professionals globally.
www.getwsodo.com
